t_ch: 现在黉学先生勒令我们「罗浮三少」从此改称「三少学习互助组」，真是丢死人了！这样以后还有谁能服我们！
t_en: We've been ordered to change our name from "The Luofu Trio" to "The Luofu Study Club..." It's so embarrassing! Now no-one's gonna respect us anymore...

t_ch: 你自己说说看吧，应该怎么赔偿我们？
t_en: So tell us — how much compensation are you gonna give?

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮了。
t_en: I'm planning on leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 嗯？这就想跑了？
t_en: Huh? Trying to flee?

t_ch: 老大，算了算了，让这个灾星赶紧离开罗浮，咱们也好重新开展工作。
t_en: *sigh* Boss, let's just forget about it. Let this bad omen off the Luofu so we can get on with business.

t_ch: 你走就走吧，跟我们有什么关系？我们很熟吗？还要来和我们道个别？
t_en: Just go then, what's it gotta do with us? You think we're friends or something? You wanna say goodbye to us?

t_ch: 丹枢托我给你们带个话。
t_en: Dan Shu asked me to bring you a message.

t_ch: 丹枢？丹枢是谁啊？
t_en: Dan Shu? Who's Dan Shu?

t_ch: 就是前几天新闻里说的那个药王秘传的老大啊！
t_en: She's the leader of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus — the one everyone was talking about!

t_ch: 药…药王秘传？你你你你你们找我有什么事？
t_en: *gulp* Sanctus... Medicus? Wh—wh—what do you want with me?

t_ch: 要我们加入你们吗？
t_en: You want us to join you or something?

t_ch: 离小鱼远一点，否则…
t_en: Stay away from Xiaoyu, y'hear? Otherwise...

t_ch: 你们药王秘传这样公开恐吓我们无辜小朋友，胆子真大啊？
t_en: Y—You guys must think you're pretty tough, bullying kids like us out in the open.

t_ch: 那你们报警吧。
t_en: Have us arrested then.

t_ch: 老大，咱们认怂吧，他们可玩真的。您真和药王秘传结仇，我可不敢再奉陪了……
t_en: Time to throw in the towel boss — they're playing for real. If you wanna start a fight with the Disciples, I'm out.

t_ch: 就是就是！得罪了这帮妖人，这可不是打屁股就能解决的事情了！我妈说他们一天吃三四个小孩呢！
t_en: Ugh, guess you're right, these guys mean business. My mom said they eat three or four kids for breakfast!

t_ch: 我我我我我我知道了…那个，你！我们答应你，以后再也不找小鱼的麻烦了！你们能保证不来找我们麻烦吗？
t_en: Y—Yeah... Ahem! Hey, you — we promise not to bully Xiaoyu again, if you promise not to mess with us.

t_ch: 也不许找其他小朋友麻烦。
t_en: And don't bully any other kids, either.

t_ch: 看你们表现吧。
t_en: That depends on your end of the bargain.

t_ch: 那那那那…我们答应你！你可要说话算话啊！
t_en: O—O—Okay, we promise! But you have to keep your word too!

t_ch: 那咱们「罗浮三少」还……
t_en: Then as the Luofu Trio, we...

t_ch: 混账！我们叫「三少学习互助会」！还敢叫什么「罗浮三少」，我看你是真不怕药王秘传啊！
t_en: Shh! We're the Luofu Study Club now! Don't say anything about the Trio. You ought to be more afraid of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus!

t_ch: 老大英明！「三少学习互助会」万岁！
t_en: Good thinking, Boss! Long live the Luofu Study Club!

t_ch: 将军，奠仪结束了。您该歇息了。
t_en: General, the ceremony has finished. You should take a rest.

t_ch: 且再等等，我还有几句话要和列车团的朋友们讲。
t_en: Not yet. I have things I wish to convey to my Astral friends.

t_ch: 抱歉，彦卿一直让我好好躺着…没法早点来见各位。
t_en: My apologies, I couldn't get to you any sooner — Yanqing made sure that I was fully recuperated...

t_ch: 在诸位离开罗浮前，我有两样东西想送给星穹列车。
t_en: Before you leave the Luofu, there are two things I wish to gift the Express.

t_ch: 礼物？他终于良心发现，要补偿咱们这一路的辛苦了吗？
t_en: Two gifts? Has his conscience finally gotten the better of him? Is he going to make up for all our hard work along the way?

t_ch: 将军太客气了！
t_en: You're too kind, General!

t_ch: 该不会真的要送咱们房子吧？
t_en: I'd like some free real estate, please!

t_ch: 那么，各位，咱们神策府见。
t_en: Please, let us reconvene at the Seat of Divine Foresight.

t_ch: 云骑们只找到她随身携带的扇子。和我们同行的那位「停云」究竟是受幻胧操纵的傀儡，还是某种一叶障目的幻术，这一切暂时无法查清了。
t_en: The Cloud Knights were only able to find her fan — she took it with her everywhere. It's currently unclear if Tingyun was a puppet manipulated by Phantylia, or if some form of deception was used to cloud our vision.

t_ch: 我已做好最坏的打算，以军团的作风，那位天舶司接渡使本人怕是…凶多吉少。
t_en: I'm already prepared for the worst. Considering how the Legion operates, I fear the fate of the Sky-Faring Commission Amicassador may be a bleak one.

t_ch: 但停云一事如何处理，终究应由她的狐人同胞决定。我将事情的梗概通报了天舶司。这件物品，我想还是由你们去送更合适。
t_en: As for how matters are handled with regards to Tingyun, I believe it's best left to her foxian kin. I have informed the Sky-Faring Commission of the events which took place, and I think it would be best if you were the one to deliver this item to Yukong.

t_ch: 我还是难以相信。那份战报当真不是一个拙劣的玩笑么？
t_en: I still can't believe it. The whole report reads like a bad joke — it's simply unimaginable.

t_ch: 反物质军团出现在仙舟上？「停云」她…是某个绝灭大君的伪装？我不相信……
t_en: The Antimatter Legion on the Xianzhou? And Tingyun... a Lord Ravager?

t_ch: 那个和我共事三十多年，曾经与我一同操持过天舶司事务的停云，怎么可能是某个怪物的伪装？原本的她现在又身在何方？
t_en: How could someone who spent over thirty years working alongside me at the Sky-Faring Commission... turn out to be nothing more than a monster in disguise? What happened to the real Tingyun?

t_ch: 各位，我能否冒昧地请你们来，一同见证？
t_en: I'd like to ask you all to witness this event with me.

t_ch: 等杂务处理完毕，我想参与云骑的调查，亲自驾驶星槎，沿着停云进入仙舟前的航路追溯此事的细节。我一定会查明，她到底遭遇了什么……
t_en: Once I've finished handling the various tasks at hand, I want to aid the Cloud Knights in their investigation. I'll fly out on a starskiff and trace Tingyun's original flight path onto the Xianzhou. Rest assured, I will leave no stone unturned.

t_ch: 罗浮送出的结盟玉兆的另一半，玉兆被雕凿成猛虎之形，不知这究竟代表什么意思。
t_en: The second half of Luofu's jade abacus of allying oath. It takes on the shape of a tiger — not sure if this detail carries any significance.

t_ch: 罗浮仙舟赠送给列车团的盟谊之证，可喜可贺，真是可喜可贺啊！但其实你更希望收到一人一套长乐天的宅子作礼物。
t_en: A symbol of friendship bestowed by the Xianzhou Luofu. As valuable as the gift is, you were secretly hoping that they'd gave each of you a manor in Exalting Sanctum.

t_ch: 按景元的说法，只需握紧玉兆发出讯息，桌上这枚玉兆便能遥想感应，云骑军立时赶来——你的手指一阵痒痒，你想现在就试试。
t_en: According to Jing Yuan, holding the jade abacus firmly in your hand will send out a message to the Cloud Knights and they will rush to your aid. It's difficult to resist the temptation of giving it a try right now.

t_ch: 质地如玉，又如久历年月的青铜，看起来质朴无华的信物，不过其上的嵌金纹饰出卖了它的尊贵身份。
t_en: Looking at the plain color of jade and patina, it's easy to think that such an item is of no particular value. But the golden inlay points to its noble origin.

t_ch: （要出发前往下一站了，去观景车厢和大家会合吧……）
t_en: (Time to head to the next stop. Let's meet up with everyone in the Parlor Car...)

t_ch: 列车长还没来吗？
t_en: Pom-Pom's not here yet?

t_ch: 帕姆也有卖关子的时候啊。
t_en: Pom-Pom knows how to keep people on the edge of their seats.

t_ch: 咳咳，各位乘客久等了。因为是重要的事，所以列车长我花了点时间准备帕。
t_en: *ahem* Apologies for the delay, dear passengers. Something important came up, so I, the conductor, had to spend some time preparing!

t_ch: 所以是什么事？
t_en: So... what came up?

t_ch: 对啊对啊，什么事这么重要？
t_en: Yeah! What was so important?

t_ch: 难得见列车长发话。
t_en: It's rare for the conductor to make an announcement.

t_ch: 对啊对啊，什么事这么重要？
t_en: Yeah! What was so important?

t_ch: 又要变更航线了吗？
t_en: Are we switching routes again?

t_ch: 啊？我才刚刚收拾好行李欸！
t_en: Huh? But I only just finished packing my bags!

t_ch: 各位乘客应该都知道了帕？列车此行的目的地是「盛会之星」匹诺康尼。
t_en: I thought everyone knew! Our next destination is the Planet of Festivities, Penacony.

t_ch: 虽然本列车长也知道，大家对那座闻名宇宙的星空酒店期待已久，但在出发前，有三件事得再提醒下各位。
t_en: I know everyone's eager to disembark and get to that famous stellar hotel, but before we set off, I should remind everyone of three things.

t_ch: 第一，匹诺康尼所处的阿斯德纳是一片「忆质」充盈的星系，历史上曾是忆域泄露的「大孔洞」之一。尽管过去了数千年，前方的忆质浓度仍高于均值。
t_en: First: Penacony is located in Asdana, a star system brimming with memoria, which has historically been one of the Macro Voids that leaked out from the Memory Zone. Even after eons, the memoria concentration up ahead is above normal levels.

t_ch: 通常来讲是不会有什么大问题…但每个人的身体情况不同，一旦出现晕眩、幻觉或者记忆紊乱等问题，一定不要轻视！
t_en: Usually, this wouldn't be a huge problem... but everyone's different, so if you exhibit any signs of dizziness, hallucination, distorted memories or any other symptoms, you should take them seriously!

t_ch: 第二，匹诺康尼是「同谐」家族的属地，这也是家族首次向其他派系公开发出邀约。要记得，列车是以客人的身份受邀前往，该遵守的规矩一定要遵守。
t_en: Second: Penacony is a colony belonging to the Harmony Family — it also marks the first time this Family has extended a public invitation to other factions. Please remember that the Express has been invited as a guest, and that we must adhere to any and all regulations.

t_ch: 懂的，就是入乡随俗呗！放心吧列车长，咱们绝不给无名客丢脸。
t_en: Got it! When in Rome, as they say! Don't worry, Conductor, we definitely won't embarrass the Nameless.

t_ch: 最后是第三点，与其说是要求…帕姆想向各位提出一个不情之请。
t_en: Rome? Anyway... Third and final: Rather than being a request... Pom-Pom has a favor to ask of everyone.

t_ch: 如果可以——希望你们在度假之余，也能抽些时间，帮忙打听几位「无名客」的消息。
t_en: If you could, I hope that while you're all on vacation, you could spare some time to help inquire about a few of the Nameless.

t_ch: 什么无名客？
t_en: What Nameless?

t_ch: 要有新伙伴了？
t_en: Are we getting new crew mates?

t_ch: 我来解释吧。
t_en: Allow me to explain.

t_ch: 和列车停靠的大部分世界一样，匹诺康尼也曾是银轨上的一个站点。数千年前，这里还是公司的边陲监狱，是「开拓」将其与千星相连。
t_en: Just like most of the worlds that the Express calls at, Penacony is one of the stops along the silver tracks. Several millennia ago, it was an IPC frontier prison, and it was the Trailblaze that connected it to thousands of stars.

t_ch: 彼时，星穹列车也曾到访匹诺康尼——正如旅行有聚有散，根据列车记录，似乎有几位乘客选择了留在这里，将匹诺康尼选做自己的终点站。
t_en: During that time, the Astral Express once visited Penacony. As with all meetings, they inevitably lead to goodbyes. As the Express's logs indicate, it seems some passengers decided to call Penacony their permanent home.

t_ch: 这事很少见吗？
t_en: Is this a rare happening?

t_ch: 什么人这么重要？
t_en: Who could be this important?

t_ch: 过去这么久，还能找到吗？
t_en: It's been so long. Will we still be able to find them?

t_ch: 别紧张，就把它当作一种重返故地的仪式吧。列车离开后，{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}隔断诸界，匹诺康尼的归属也几度易主。
t_en: Don't worry, just think of it as returning to your hometown. Following the Express's departure, the {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellarons{RUBY_E#} cut off contact to myriad worlds, and Penacony's ownership switched hands several times.

t_ch: 那些留在此地的老无名客们后来过得如何，经历了哪些事，又给这世界留下了怎样的痕迹…探寻先人们的足迹，也不失为一种冒险。
t_en: Why did these Nameless choose to stay here? How did the course of their subsequent lives unfold, and what legacies did they leave behind? Retracing our predecessors' footsteps, that is in itself an adventure, wouldn't you agree?

t_ch: 即便离开了星空，无名客的「开拓」也不会结束。列车长也是这么想的，对不对？
t_en: Even if they left the stars behind them, their Trailblaze would not be over. That's also what the conductor thinks, isn't it?

t_ch: 根据乘员名册，当年下车的三位乘客分别叫铁尔南、拉格沃克和拉扎莉娜，曾是列车的护卫、机修工和测绘师。除此之外就没有别的信息了。
t_en: According to the passenger list, the three people who got off were Tiernan, Legwork, and Razalina — the Express's guard, mechanic, and surveyor, respectively. No supplementary details are available.

t_ch: 只有名字和职业？听着还不一定是真名…这不是大海捞针吗？
t_en: Just names and occupations? And they don't even sound like their real names either... This will be like looking for a needle in a haystack!

t_ch: 随缘就好。考虑到无名客的多样性…我们说不定还能找到他们的后代，甚至有极小的概率——能见到本人哦。
t_en: We'll just leave it to the stars of fate. Considering the Nameless' diversity... Perhaps we might even stumble upon their descendants, or, against the slimmest of chances, the very individuals themselves.

t_ch: 那么本次航线会议就到这里吧。离跃迁还有一段时间，大家可以再花些时间检查行李。
t_en: We'll conclude today's navigation meeting on this point. There's a bit of time left before we jump. In the meantime, might be a good idea to double-check your bags.

t_ch: 跃迁开始前，本列车长会广播通知的帕！
t_en: I'll broadcast an announcement before we jump!

t_ch: （离跃迁还有段时间…找大家聊聊天吧。）
t_en: (There's still some time before the jump... I should talk to everyone.)

t_ch: 照相机，没问题；换洗衣物，没问题；洗护用品……
t_en: Camera, check. Extra clothes, check. Toiletries...

t_ch: …哎呀，糟了！先前下单的分装瓶还没送到呢。不过听说匹诺康尼的度假酒店超级高档，洗护用品想必也差不了吧？
t_en: ...Ahh, drat! The travel bottles I ordered haven't arrived. Although, I hear that Penacony's resort hotel is pretty luxurious. I'm guessing their toiletries should be just as fancy.

t_ch: 那我岂不是能给行李箱再腾点空间出来？再带点什么好呢……
t_en: That means I can make more room in my suitcase. What else should I bring...

t_ch: 带些吃的。
t_en: Take some food.

t_ch: 好主意！说到旅行自然是要逛吃逛吃…啊，不过难得度个假，是不是多品尝些当地美食比较好……
t_en: Good idea! A vacation without munching on-the-go? Unheard of! Mm, but since time-off is a rarity, I'm kinda leaning towards savoring the local dishes...

t_ch: 带上帕姆玩偶。
t_en: Take your Pom-Pom toy.

t_ch: 帕姆玩偶…不错欸！四舍五入也是带着列车长一起玩啦。啊，但是那个玩偶有点大，估计塞不下……
t_en: My Pom-Pom toy... not a bad idea! That's kinda like bringing the conductor on vacay with me. Ah, but I think it's too big to stuff in the case...

t_ch: 带上我。
t_en: Take me.

t_ch: 行李箱装不下你啦！自己走好不好？
t_en: You won't fit in the suitcase! Can't you walk?

t_ch: 要带点小说或者漫画吗？这样在酒店房间里待着的时候也不至于无聊了，但是这些书都好重啊……
t_en: Maybe I should bring some novels or comic books? At least then I won't be too bored while staying in the hotel room. But these books are so heavy...

t_ch: 好纠结啊，再带点什么好呢……
t_en: Oooh this is hard! What else should I take...

t_ch: 好纠结啊，再带点什么好呢……
t_en: Oooh this is hard! What else should I take...

t_ch: 我和瓦尔特先生说过了，这次由我留守列车，祝你们在匹诺康尼玩得开心。
t_en: I spoke to Mr. Yang. I'll be staying on the Express this time. I wish you all a delightful time in Penacony.

t_ch: 你不一起来吗？
t_en: You're not coming?

t_ch: 谢谢，你的好意我心领了，但我不喜欢太过喧嚣的地方。列车的工作也总得有人来处理。
t_en: Thank you, I appreciate the invitation, but I don't like bustling places, and someone has to handle the work on the Express.

t_ch: 还是一起来吧，机会难得…
t_en: You should come with us, it's such a rare opportunity...

t_ch: 谢谢，你的好意我心领了，但我不喜欢太过喧嚣的地方。列车的工作也总得有人来处理。
t_en: Thank you, I appreciate the invitation, but I don't like bustling places, and someone has to handle the work on the Express.

t_ch: 我尊重你的决定，好好休息。
t_en: I respect your decision. Rest well.

t_ch: 谢谢，{NICKNAME}。能得到你的理解，我也感到轻松了些。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. It's reassuring to know we're on a similar wavelength.

t_ch: 仙舟的事不用在意，匹诺康尼并非我们旅途的最后一站，来日方长，等到收拾妥当，我自然会赶上你们的。
t_en: Pay no mind to the matters concerning the Xianzhou. Penacony isn't the final stop on our trip. We have plenty of time. Once everything is packed up, I will naturally catch up with all of you.

t_ch: 你也多花些时间清点行李为好。听说家族的入境手续很繁琐，等入住了再发现问题，就来不及了。
t_en: I'd advise double-checking your bags. Word is that The Family's customs procedure can be quite demanding. Better to sort it out now than face issues at your hotel check-in.

t_ch: 你也多花些时间清点行李为好。听说家族的入境手续很繁琐，等入住了再发现问题，就来不及了。
t_en: I'd advise double-checking your bags. Word is that The Family's customs procedure can be quite demanding. Better to sort it out now than face issues at your hotel check-in.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，怎么样？做好出发的准备了吗？
t_en: How's it going, {NICKNAME}? All packed and ready?

t_ch: 在家族的地盘上多半不会有什么惊险奇遇——在我看来有些可惜，但毕竟是个难得的放松机会，就好好享受吧。
t_en: There probably won't be any surprises happening on Family territory, which is a bit of a shame if you ask me. But hey, it's rare that we can take a break and let loose. Let's enjoy it.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生看起来很轻松。
t_en: Mr. Yang, you look relaxed.

t_ch: 冒险游历固然令人心潮澎湃，但适时放松也是非常重要的。
t_en: Well, adventures are exhilarating, but rest and recuperation is equally important.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生看起来很沮丧。
t_en: Mr. Yang, you seem disappointed.

t_ch: 不会。冒险游历固然令人心潮澎湃，但适时放松也是非常重要的。
t_en: Of course not! Adventures are exhilarating, but rest and recuperation is equally important.

t_ch: 放松之余，也别忘了帕姆的请求——列车长为我们做了许多，现在是时候回报它了。
t_en: Rest and recuperation aside, don't forget Pom-Pom's request. The conductor has done plenty for us, and it's time to return that favor.

t_ch: 放松之余，也别忘了帕姆的请求——列车长为我们做了许多，现在是时候回报它了。
t_en: Rest and recuperation aside, don't forget Pom-Pom's request. The conductor has done plenty for us, and it's time to return that favor.

t_ch: 呵呵，{NICKNAME}，你还是这么冷静啊。小三月可是像要去春游的孩子一样，激动得不得了呢。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're the picture of calm as always. Meanwhile, March 7th's buzzing around like a kid on a sugar rush.

t_ch: 我也很激动！
t_en: I'm excited, too!

t_ch: 相信匹诺康尼一定不会让你们失望。
t_en: I trust Penacony won't let you all down.

t_ch: 我这个人比较成熟稳重。
t_en: Of course, I'm the mature, adult-type.

t_ch: 一本正经地讲笑话，也算是你的看家本领了。
t_en: A punchline with a straight face — I suppose that's your specialty.

t_ch: 不过，有关「家族」这次邀请，我确实还有些在意的细节想和各位讨论下…但不是现在。先尽情享受愉快的假日吧。
t_en: But, regarding The Family's invitation, I do have some details that I wish to discuss with everyone... just not now. Let's enjoy our vacation for now.

t_ch: 尽情享受愉快的假日吧——当然，也别忘了帕姆的请求哦。
t_en: Let's enjoy ourselves first. Of course, let's not forget Pom-Pom's request either.

t_ch: （时候差不多了…找个位子坐下吧。）
t_en: (It's about time... I should find a seat.)

t_ch: 喂——喂喂——各位乘客请注意——
t_en: Ahem, hi, hello~ Attention all passengers.

t_ch: 列车即将跃迁——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
t_en: The Express is about to make the jump — the Express is about to make the jump — Please be seated and hold on!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，你怎么了？为、为什么突然哭了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what's wrong? Wh—Why are you crying all of a sudden?

t_ch: 我可能梦见了一个悲伤的未来…
t_en: I may have dreamed of a tragic future...

t_ch: 我可能梦见了一位故人…
t_en: I may have dreamed of an old friend...

t_ch: 我梦见一个谜语人在说怪话…
t_en: I dreamed of a riddler spouting strange talk...

t_ch: 我在梦里被人砍了一刀…
t_en: I dreamed I was slashed by someone with a blade...

t_ch: …听、听起来是做噩梦了帕！才刚到阿斯德纳星系就碰见这种事…你可要多小心啊，看样子，你对忆质的抵抗力很差。
t_en: ...S—Sounds like you had a nightmare! We just arrived in Asdana and already... You should be careful, it seems your tolerance to memoria isn't the strongest.

t_ch: 别在意，梦和现实都是相反的。在你睡着时，列车已经抵达匹诺康尼了……
t_en: Don't fret, dreams are often the reverse of reality. While you were sleeping, the Express arrived at Penacony...

t_ch: …当年的边陲监狱，现在已经变成这副豪华酒店的样子了。虽然列车长我也很好奇匹诺康尼如今的样子，但毕竟没办法下车…你们就代我好好感受一下吧。
t_en: ...Can you imagine? Yesterday's grim frontier prison is today's lavish hotel. I wish I could wander Penacony's streets today, but I'm pretty train-tied at the moment. You'll have to be my eyes and ears while we're here.

t_ch: 收拾好行李，随时可以下车帕。记得去后面找三月乘客，她在等你一起出发。
t_en: ...Gear up and make sure you've got everything! And before you step out, swing by the back and grab March, she's waiting for you there.

t_ch: （三月七还在收拾行李吗……）
t_en: (Is March 7th still packing her luggage...?)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你醒啦？准备得怎么样了？杨叔和姬子已经先下车了，我在这里等你一起出发。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're up? How's your prep going? Welt and Himeko beat us to the punch, but I stuck around for you. Let's get going.

t_ch: 怎么说，我们现在就去和他们会合吧？
t_en: Mm... Shall we go meet up with them now?

t_ch: 准备好了。
t_en: I'm ready to go.

t_ch: 「盛会之星」匹诺康尼，全宇宙最大最豪华的游乐场，我们来咯！
t_en: Penacony, the Planet of Festivities, the universe's biggest and fanciest amusement park awaits!

t_ch: 再等等。
t_en: Hold on a moment.

t_ch: 你落下东西了吗？快去快回，我在这里等你～
t_en: You left something behind? Hurry up and go get it, I'll wait here for you!

t_ch: 唔…可算到了！家族的入境手续也太复杂了吧，一路下来大大小小十几道检查，行李箱都翻了四、五遍……
t_en: We're here at last! The Family sure doesn't play around with their entry protocols. Our bags probably know what it feels like to be a celebrity now, with all that attention!

t_ch: 我都在担心，他们会不会非要把你体内的星核拿出来看看。
t_en: I wouldn't have put it past them to try and nab that Stellaron from inside you.

t_ch: 幸好没有。
t_en: Thankfully, they didn't.

t_ch: 星核很稳定。
t_en: The Stellaron is stable.

t_ch: 某种意义上说，家族真的是非常包容了……
t_en: Aside from that, I have to say The Family has been really accommodating...

t_ch: 但辛苦不是白费的——这酒店大堂也太壮观了吧！那密密麻麻的都是客房吗？得有多少人住在这儿啊。
t_en: Well, the hassle was worth it — just look at this grand hotel lobby! And those endless rows, they're all rooms, right? Just think of the number of guests staying here.

t_ch: 不知道咱们是哪一间，走吧走吧，杨叔他们肯定在前台排队了，我们快去汇合！
t_en: Where are our rooms? Come on, Mr. Yang and the rest must be at the front desk. Let's hurry up and meet them there!

t_ch: 欢迎光临白日梦酒店，愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如需办理入住，请直走到酒店前台。
t_en: Welcome to the Reverie! May you experience an unforgettable holiday! If you need help checking in, please head straight to the concierge.

t_ch: 是梦里的孩子…
t_en: It's the child from the dream...

t_ch: 你是酒店的服务生？
t_en: Do you work at this hotel?

t_ch: 我是米沙，匹诺康尼的服务生，很高兴为您服务。如需搬运行李……
t_en: I am Misha, a bell boy, working here on Penacony. Pleased to be at your service. If you need help with your baggage...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，快过来，好像不大对劲……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, over here, something's not right...

t_ch: …如需搬运行李到客房，您随时可以找我。去吧，别让您的朋友久等。
t_en: ...Should you need assistance with moving your luggage to your room, feel free to contact me. Please go ahead, don't keep your friend waiting.

t_ch: 又一个……
t_en: Not another one...

t_ch: …跟我来吧。
t_en: ...Come with me.

t_ch: 你是谁？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: 这是什么地方？
t_en: What is this place?

t_ch: 要去哪儿？
t_en: Where are we going?

t_ch: 这些问题…没有意义，但我会尽力为你说明：这里是现实与忆域的交界，一片…「梦境」。
t_en: These questions... have no meaning. But, I will answer you as best as I can: This is the border between reality and the Memory Zone, a... dreamscape.

t_ch: 此时此刻，你我偶然分享了同一片梦境，出现在彼此的思绪中，这便是「梦想之地」对我们最初的问候。
t_en: Right this moment, you and I have coincidentally shared the same dreamscape, and appeared in each other's minds. This is the Land of Dreams's inaugural welcome for us.

t_ch: 别担心，很快你就会从这场梦中醒来，忘记此间发生的一切，只留下淡淡的怅然。
t_en: Worry not, for very quickly, you will awaken from this dream, forget everything that has transpired, with naught but a faint lingering of loss.

t_ch: 也无需在意，这种「遗忘」发生在每一个清晨，是我们早已习惯的平常。
t_en: Pay no mind, for this forgetfulness happens with each new dawn. It is an occurrence that we have become accustomed to for so long.

t_ch: …所以，跟我来吧。我会带你回家。
t_en: ...So, come with me. I'll take you home.

t_ch: 巡海游侠，黄泉…这是他们称呼我的方式，你随意使用吧。
t_en: Galaxy Ranger, Acheron... This is what they call me. You can call me whatever you want.

t_ch: 左边，走廊尽头。我在那里等你。
t_en: Left, to the end of the corridor. I will wait there for you.

t_ch: 我不在那里，回头。
t_en: I'm not there. Turn back.

t_ch: 打开这扇门…看看瑰丽的梦境吧，趁你还记得。
t_en: Open this door... Take a look at the mesmerizing dreamscape, while you can still remember.

t_ch: （这，我的天啊……）
t_en: (This is, no way...)

t_ch: 这边。
t_en: This way.

t_ch: 你先请。
t_en: After you.

t_ch: （是要我往墙上走吗…？）
t_en: (Am I supposed to walk up the wall...?)

t_ch: （竟然真的能做到？！）
t_en: (How is this even possible!?)

t_ch: 有何不可？
t_en: (Why not?)

t_ch: （她能听见我在想什么？）
t_en: (She can hear the thoughts in my head?)

t_ch: 有何不可？
t_en: (Why not?)

t_ch: 这些声音…只是梦境的影子。无需在意。
t_en: These voices... They are just shadows of the dreamscape. Pay no heed to them.

t_ch: 你凭什么觉得自己能赢，该死的赌徒？
t_en: Ah, the charming audacity! To think that you, of all people, might emerge victorious, dear gambler.

t_ch: 三枚「筹码」足矣。所有，或者一无所有。
t_en: Three chips are enough. All or nothing.

t_ch: 「谐乐大典」的舞台只属于你，妹妹。
t_en: The Charmony Festival's stage belongs only to you, little sister.

t_ch: 可如果我不能歌唱…舞台又有什么意义？
t_en: But if I can't sing... what meaning does a stage have?

t_ch: 忆者…你觉得你能安然离开？
t_en: Memokeeper... Do you think you can just leave?

t_ch: 对不起。心仪的舞伴…我已经有人选了。
t_en: I'm sorry. The dance partner of my choice... I've already chosen.

t_ch: 你准备怎么拉他们下场？
t_en: How do you intend to pull them off the stage?

t_ch: 将真相如数奉上，他们自然会赴约。
t_en: All we have to do is present the truth, and they will naturally reciprocate.

t_ch: 欢迎光临白日梦酒店，愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如需办理入住，请直走到酒店前台……
t_en: Welcome to the Reverie! May you experience an unforgettable holiday! If you need help checking in, please head straight to the concierge...

t_ch: 我们快到了。还走得动么？
t_en: We're almost there. Can you still walk?

t_ch: 我已上墙，感觉良好。
t_en: Now I Am Become Trailblaze, the Perambulator of Walls.

t_ch: 很幽默呢。既然有心思开玩笑，我就认为你没事了。
t_en: You're funny. If you can crack jokes, you're probably fine.

t_ch: 我有点头晕……
t_en: I feel a bit faint...

t_ch: 别紧张，是正常现象。
t_en: Don't panic, this is normal.

t_ch: 别停下，别回头，别往下看，也别往上看。
t_en: Don't stop, don't turn back, don't look down. Or up, for that matter.

t_ch: 欢迎光临白日梦酒店，愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如需办理入住，请直走到酒店前台……
t_en: Welcome to the Reverie! May you experience an unforgettable holiday! If you need help checking in, please head straight to the concierge...

t_ch: …我们到了。
t_en: ...We're here.

t_ch: 离开这里吧，就像平日那样醒来，忘记这场偶然的邂逅，回到你来的地方。
t_en: Leave this realm, and rise as you would on any other day. Forget this fortuitous encounter, and return whence you came.

t_ch: 但在分别前，我有一个请求。
t_en: But before you do, I would make a request of you.

t_ch: 在你听来，或许会有些古怪，甚至失礼，但我想知道……
t_en: You may think it somewhat strange, perhaps even rude, but I wish to know...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>…我们在哪里见过吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>...Have we met somewhere before?</color>

t_ch: 也许见过。
t_en: Perhaps we have.

t_ch: 应该没有。
t_en: Probably not.

t_ch: 我不知道。
t_en: I don't know.

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 怎么回事…
t_en: What's going on...

t_ch: {M#<color=#ff3a3e>你让我想起一位故人。在朦胧的记忆中，他与我刀剑相向…正如这光怪陆离的梦境，近在咫尺却不可触及。</color>}{F#<color=#ff3a3e>你让我想起一位故人。在朦胧的记忆中，她与我并肩而立…正如这光怪陆离的梦境，近在咫尺却不可触及。</color>}
t_en: {M#<color=#ff3a3e>You evoke memories of an old friend. In the haze of my recollections, he crossed blades with me, much like this surreal dreamscape where we stood close, yet forever out of reach.</color>}{F#<color=#ff3a3e>You evoke memories of an old friend. In the haze of my recollections, she stood shoulder to shoulder with me, much like this surreal dreamscape where we stood close, yet forever out of reach.</color>}

t_ch: 我可以再问你几个问题吗？我…时常会忘记一些事，因此比起回忆，我更习惯用「感受」去捕捉些什么。答案正确与否不重要，重要的是你当下的反应。
t_en: May I ask you a few more questions? I... tend to forget things — which is why, rather than memories, I'm accustomed to using my emotions to capture what I normally wouldn't otherwise. The answer is inconsequential. Your spontaneous reaction is what matters.

t_ch: 例如你在客房醒来时，口中曾念起几个名字，他们是你的伙伴？家人？敌人？你似乎已经和许多人、许多事建立了牢不可破的联系……
t_en: For instance, when you awaken in your room, your lips speak several names. Are they your companions? Family? Enemies? You seem to have forged unbreakable bonds with many people and many incidents...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>请问，你会对失去这种联系感到恐惧吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>Might I ask if you fear losing these bonds?</color>

t_ch: 我完全无法忍受这种恐惧。
t_en: I cannot bear such a fear.

t_ch: 如果这意味着他们离去，我会。
t_en: If it means losing them, I would.

t_ch: 如果这意味着自己消失，我会。
t_en: If it means that I will disappear, I would.

t_ch: 我不会感到害怕。
t_en: I feel no fear.

t_ch: 我不知道。
t_en: I don't know.

t_ch: 嗯…那如果有一片巨大的梦境，它足够逼真，逼真到与现实无异。那里没有生离死别，每个人都能收获应得的美满与幸福，并永远快乐地生活下去。
t_en: Mm... Then, if there was a vast dreamscape, so lifelike it's indistinguishable from reality. There, no one faces life's separations or deaths. Everyone attains their deserved happiness and lives joyfully ever after.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>请问，你会愿意栖身其中吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>I would ask: Would you wish to stay?</color>

t_ch: 无论如何，我都愿意栖身其中。
t_en: I would, no matter the cost.

t_ch: 如果我毋须付出代价，我愿意。
t_en: If I didn't have to pay any price, I would.

t_ch: 这取决于我要付出何种代价。
t_en: That depends on the price I'd have to pay.

t_ch: 无论如何，我都不愿活在梦中。
t_en: I would never want to live in a dream.

t_ch: 我不知道。
t_en: I don't know.

t_ch: 那…倘若这美梦注定支离破碎，任何事物都将离去：朋友、亲人、陌生人；然后是轻快的风、飞翔的鸟儿、群星…最后是你自己。
t_en: Now... imagine if this splendid dream were fated to fall apart: Friends, family, strangers, followed by the gentle breeze, soaring birds, the stars... and ultimately, yourself.

t_ch: 每一个人，他们记忆中的每个人，那些笑容和眼泪，完成与未能完成的约定…最后都将迈向既定的终局。如果在启程之初，你便已知晓此行的终点……
t_en: Everyone, and every face they remember, the joy and the heartaches, the vows sealed and those left hanging... all will inevitably march towards a predetermined ending. If you had grasped the journey's finale right from its inception...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>请问，你还会踏上这段旅途吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>I would ask: Would you still embark on this journey?</color>

t_ch: 我会放弃——这代价实在太过沉重。
t_en: I would abandon it — the price is too dear.

t_ch: 我会放弃——我已体会过美好的梦。
t_en: I would abandon it — I have already tasted the beauty of dreams.

t_ch: 我会放弃——开拓并非我的本意。
t_en: I would abandon it — Trailblazing was never my intent.

t_ch: 我会义无反顾地开拓下去。
t_en: I would blaze a trail without hesitation.

t_ch: 我不知道。
t_en: I don't know.

t_ch: 我知道这很难，不必着急作出决定。我说了…答案并不重要。
t_en: I know this is hard, you don't have to be hard-pressed to make a decision. As I have said... the answer is inconsequential.

t_ch: 聆听、触碰、思考，由此你将获得感受——珍惜它，凭借感受，我们做出选择。所以回到最初的问题……
t_en: Hearing, touch, thought — through these, you gain emotions — cherish them. With emotions, we make choices. And so we return to the original question...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>请问…你还记得我吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>I would ask... Do you still remember me?</color>

t_ch: 我似乎在哪里见过你……
t_en: I seem to remember you from somewhere...

t_ch: 不，这是我们第一次见面。
t_en: No, this is the first time we've met.

t_ch: …我明白了。
t_en: ...I understand.

t_ch: 多么有趣啊。方才那一瞬间，仿佛有千百万个相似而不相同的你，给出了截然不同的回答。
t_en: How interesting. For a split second, it felt like countless versions of you, alike yet distinct, gave entirely different responses.

t_ch: 这的确是最后一个问题了，谢谢。我们都还有各自的路要走，就此别过吧。
t_en: That was my final question, thank you. We all have our paths to walk, so we shall bid our farewells.

t_ch: 我们还能再见吗？
t_en: Will we meet again?

t_ch: 你还没告诉我怎么离开…
t_en: You haven't told me how to leave this place...

t_ch: 金色的美梦要开始躁动了。在接下来的长夜里，你恐怕会遭遇许多挫折，见证众多悲剧，最后…目中所见只余黑白二色。
t_en: The golden dream is getting restless. In the coming long night, I'm afraid you will face many tribulations and witness many tragedies. And finally... your sight will only see black and white.

t_ch: 但请相信，在那黑白的世界中会有一点红色稍纵即逝，但在你做出抉择之时，它必将再度示现……
t_en: But please believe me that in that monochrome world, there will be a glimpse of fleeting red, and when you make a choice, it will reappear before you once more...

t_ch: 只是眼下正值「谐乐大典」前夕，匹诺康尼每一纪最重要的时刻。又遇上家族发出邀请，全银河的客人把这儿挤得水泄不通……
t_en: It's just that right now, we're on the eve of the Charmony Festival, Penacony's most important moment of every era. And with The Family's invite, all guests from all over the cosmos have thronged this place...

t_ch: 酒店安保是雪上加霜，容不得半点闪失。突然发生这种事，真不是这位小姐能说了算的——星穹列车的各位，就别难为人家啦。
t_en: Hotel security is on high alert, with zero room for error. And with such a last minute change, it really isn't something that this young lady's words can resolve on a whim. My esteemed guests from the Astral Express, please do not make it harder for her.

t_ch: 我们在办理入住时遇到了些问题，给您带来的不便，深感抱歉。请问这位先生是？
t_en: We're sorry for all the trouble our check-in seems to have caused. Might I ask for your name?

t_ch: 不才「砂金」，隶属公司战略投资部，主管「钻石」手下的不良资产清算专家，此次受<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表匠」</color>邀请前来……
t_en: I am the humble Aventurine of the IPC's Strategic Investment Department, a Non-Performing Asset Liquidation Specialist and subordinate to supervisor Diamond. I was cordially invited by the <color=#dbc291ff>Watchmaker</color>...

t_ch: 同时，也是一位在你们身后等了好久的游客。
t_en: I also happen to be a traveler that's had to stand behind you for quite a while.

t_ch: …我来吧。
t_en: ...Leave it to me.

t_ch: 听闻星际和平公司也收到了匹诺康尼的邀请，想必您就是代表了，公司精英果真气质不凡——如此了不得的大人物，可否给我们行个方便呢？
t_en: I've heard that the IPC has also received Penacony's invitation, so forgive me if I'm mistaken, but you must be the representative. The IPC's elite certainly does have an extraordinary air about them. I suppose such an exceptional figure such as yourself wouldn't mind paving a convenience for us?

t_ch: 我没听错吧——行个方便？这话不该由我对各位说吗？
t_en: I must be hearing things: Paving a convenience? Shouldn't I be saying this to you instead?

t_ch: 我已经在这里等了十多分钟了，您知道对我而言，十多分钟等于多少信用点吗？
t_en: I've been waiting here for more than ten minutes. Do you know how many credits ten minutes is worth to me?

t_ch: 想必是笔天文数字吧，所以现在，砂金先生，我这儿有一笔您不容错过的「投资」。
t_en: It must be an inordinate number, which is why, now, Mr. Aventurine, I have an investment that you absolutely cannot miss out on.

t_ch: 公司影响力遍及寰宇，说话的分量自然也重，我们希望能借您的身份——为{M#他}{F#她}做个担保。
t_en: The IPC's influence runs deep and wide, and their word wields the utmost authority. We hope to borrow your status to vouch for {M#him}{F#her}.

t_ch: 如此一来，您不仅能省下许多宝贵的时间，还能结交一批新朋友。
t_en: As such, you won't just be sparing much of your invaluable time but also forging new friendships.

t_ch: 这倒有意思。那这些朋友能为我带来什么？
t_en: Well, this is interesting. And how will my new friends benefit me?

t_ch: 这就是个更值得一聊的话题了。同为<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表匠」</color>的客人，我们何不先在匹诺康尼落座，再慢慢花时间了解彼此呢？
t_en: Now this is a topic very much worth getting into. Just as we are guests of the <color=#dbc291ff>Watchmaker</color>, why don't we make ourselves comfortable in Penacony before getting to know each other more elaborately?

t_ch: 可以，可以。不过领航员小姐，我必须得指出——
t_en: Sounds good. But Ms. Navigator, I must point out that—

t_ch: 如果我出手，那这省下的时间应当是我为自己争取来的——而不是你们带给我的。
t_en: If I do something about it now, the time saved is from my own effort, not a favor from you all.

t_ch: …但您说的后半句，我特别喜欢！朋友，对，没什么比朋友更珍贵，更何况是无名客这样光明磊落的开拓者。
t_en: ...But what you said in the second half, I loved it! Friends, yes — nothing is more precious than friends, especially a righteous Trailblazer like a Nameless.

t_ch: 往后我这趟匹诺康尼之旅，就得劳烦各位「开拓」朋友多多照顾了。希望我们——相处愉快。
t_en: Going forward on this Penacony trip, I'll be counting on all my "Trailblazer" friends here. Looking forward to a delightful time with you all.

t_ch: 很高兴您能这么说，那担保的事……
t_en: I'm glad you've put it this way. So about the vouching...

t_ch: 小姐，你都看到了。看在我的面子上，让这位{M#先生}{F#女士}入住吧。
t_en: There you go, Miss. Please allow {M#him}{F#her} to check in on my account.

t_ch: 我和家族的「星期日」先生有约，稍后会拜托他出面应付这事。放心，绝不给你添麻烦。
t_en: I have an appointment with The Family's Mr. Sunday. I will ask him to handle this matter later. Don't worry, I won't cause you any trouble.

t_ch: 这，可是……
t_en: Um, but...

t_ch: 艾丽，稍安勿躁。
t_en: Alley, just a moment.

t_ch: 家族可不能让客人们带着负担入梦啊。
t_en: The Family cannot allow guests to enter a dream while bearing burdens.

t_ch: 说到就到，瞧瞧这是谁来了——星期日，匹诺康尼最英俊的男人！还有闻名宇宙的歌者「知更鸟」。
t_en: Speak of the devil, look who's here! It's Sunday, the most handsome man in Penacony! Along with the singer renowned across the universe: Robin!

t_ch: 他说你是匹诺康尼最英俊的人，真有意思。
t_en: He said you were the most dashing person in Penacony, how interesting.

t_ch: 让您久等了，砂金先生。这边请，我们借一步说话。
t_en: I've kept you waiting, Mr. Aventurine. This way please, let us speak in private.

t_ch: 星穹列车的各位，请来这边稍事休息。
t_en: Astral Express guests, please come this way and rest your feet.

t_ch: 诶，你是……
t_en: Wait, what!? You're...!

t_ch: 那个，请问，你…不是，您难道是……
t_en: Wait a minute, I'm sorry, but are you... the...?

t_ch: 那位歌手，艾普瑟隆的超级巨星…《使一颗心免于哀伤》是您的作品，对吧？
t_en: The singer, Epsilon's superstar... If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking. That's your song, isn't it?

t_ch: 没想到这么可爱的小姐也是我的歌迷呢。
t_en: I never thought a cutie like yourself would be a fan of mine.

t_ch: 啊，果然是那位「知更鸟」！居然能在这里见到本尊……
t_en: Ahh, it really is Robin! To run into her in person here...

t_ch: 能与各位相遇也是我的荣幸。
t_en: It is an honor to meet everyone.

t_ch: 您和那位先生一样，都是匹诺康尼的家族成员？
t_en: Are you also a member of The Family on Penacony like him?

t_ch: 实不相瞒，我和各位一样都是客人。匹诺康尼是我的故乡，但长大后我就离开了这里，此次有幸受邀，回来为「谐乐大典」献唱一曲。
t_en: Truth be told, I am a guest like everyone. Penacony is my hometown, but I left when I was older. I was graciously invited this time to return and sing a song at the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 您口中的星期日是我的兄长，匹诺康尼当地的话事人之一，也是此次「谐乐大典」的主办人。他听闻列位遇到麻烦，便携我前来提供帮助。
t_en: The person you speak of is Sunday, my senior, and one of the local leaders of Penacony. He is also the organizer of this era's Charmony Festival. He heard you all ran into some difficulties, and sent me here to provide aid.

t_ch: 可惜还是到得晚了些，给各位带来了不好的入住体验，实在抱歉。
t_en: Alas, I arrived a little later than usual. I sincerely apologize for any unpleasantness during your stay.

t_ch: 请放心，我已吩咐艾丽小姐尽快解决「系统故障」——再给各位升级房型作为补偿。酒店稍后就会安排合适的房间。
t_en: Please be at ease, I have instructed Miss Alley to resolve the system error as soon as possible. I have also upgraded your rooms as token compensation. Please wait a moment for the hotel to arrange for suitable accommodation.

t_ch: 砂金先生与「橡木家系」有约，先行入住了。我代他向星穹列车的各位致歉，并期待将来与各位一同共事。
t_en: Mr. Aventurine has an appointment with the Oak Family, and has checked in prior. On his behalf, I extend his apologies to everyone of the Astral Express, and wish for an amicable partnership moving forward.

t_ch: 感谢您愿意从中斡旋。不过单独为我们升级房型是否不妥？据我所知，一同收到邀请的派系来宾应该不在少数吧。
t_en: Thank you for stepping in to resolve this matter, but are you sure about the rooms? I wouldn't want your other guests to feel we were being given preferential treatment...

t_ch: 您放心，家族会负责出面沟通。各位惠临匹诺康尼，我们作为<color=#dbc291ff>实际管理人</color>理应为各位排忧解难。
t_en: Please rest assured that The Family will personally undertake communications to handle this. It is only right that we — <color=#dbc291ff>as the actual administrators</color> — relieve you of any problems during your visit in Penacony.

t_ch: 抱歉占用了各位宝贵的时间，我们就不打扰了。如在匹诺康尼有任何需要，家族随时为您效劳。
t_en: I apologize for taking up everyone's precious time, and we shan't keep you any longer. If you need anything else while in Penacony, The Family stands ready to serve.

t_ch: 愿各位在梦中度过一段美妙的时光。
t_en: May your dreams be beautiful and pleasant.

t_ch: 总算到了。大家先回房间放行李吧。
t_en: We're finally here. Let's all head to our rooms first and put down our bags.

t_ch: 瓦尔特，我们先喝一杯？匹诺康尼的「苏乐达」很有名哦。
t_en: Welt, how about a drink first? Penacony's SoulGlad is very famous.

t_ch: …说吧，我们或许在想同一件事。
t_en: ...Go on. We may be thinking of the same thing.

t_ch: 你还记得列车收到的「邀请函」吗？
t_en: Do you remember the invite that the Express received?

t_ch: 「诚邀*家族的贵客*莅临匹诺康尼，与其他来宾一道，参加盛大的欢宴。」——正是因为这份邀请，我们才会出现在这里。
t_en: "The Family's esteemed guests are cordially invited to Penacony to participate in our grand celebration." That's why we're here in the first place.

t_ch: 记得不错——但这邀请函还有下文。
t_en: You recall correctly, but there was more to this invite.

t_ch: 「…将梦中的不可能之事尽收眼底，寻得匹诺康尼之父『钟表匠』的遗产，而后解答：生命因何而沉睡。」
t_en: "...Witness the impossible in the realm of dreams, find the Legacy of the Watchmaker, Father of Penacony, and thus the answer to the question: Why does life slumber."

t_ch: 我不记得邀请函中有这么一段…你是说，其中还有密文？
t_en: I don't remember that part of the invite... You mean, there was a hidden message?

t_ch: 这就是耐人寻味的地方。家族送来的「邀请函」是一只八音盒，转动发条便会伴着谐乐发出声音。
t_en: This is the part that intrigues me — the invite sent by The Family was nothing more than a music box that, when wound, would play an accompanying tune.

t_ch: 可送抵我们手中的这只却有些奇怪…它播放的乐音背景中掺杂了一些不和谐音。
t_en: But the box that was sent to us was slightly unusual... The music it played had off-key notes in the background.

t_ch: 我转录下这些杂音，它们与列车跃迁时的引力波频率完全吻合，而以列车引擎的空间曲率为密钥——我得到了上面这段话。
t_en: I recorded these dissonant notes, and they were a perfect match with the gravity wave frequency when the Express made its warp jump. Also, the Express engine's spatial curvature was its encryption key.

t_ch: …是无名客常用的求救手段。
t_en: ...A distress call method regularly used by the Nameless.

t_ch: 还不能下定论，也可能是假面愚者搞的鬼。只看手法，「谜语人」或异问魔也做得到。
t_en: I can't be certain. It may be a Masked Fool's trap. From the execution itself, the Riddlers or Inquisition Spirits could have done this themselves.

t_ch: 什么时候发现的？
t_en: When did you discover this?

t_ch: 在你们处理罗浮星核的时候，我第一时间告诉了帕姆。
t_en: When we were handling that Luofu Stellaron matter. I told Pom-Pom about it first thing.

t_ch: 难怪你刚才要求出面，那位公司使节也说出了「钟表匠」这个名字。恐怕他收到的邀请函中也有类似的密文——并且同样被破译了。
t_en: It's no wonder that IPC ambassador also mentioned this "Watchmaker." The invite he received must also have contained a hidden message, and it seems like he decoded it.

t_ch: …还有件令我在意的事。当说到邀请函时，那位家族话事人是这么回应的：「作为匹诺康尼的实际管理人，家族理应为各位排忧解难」。
t_en: ...There's something else on my mind. When the invite was brought up, that Family leader mentioned being one of the "actual administrators" of Penacony, and that it was their duty to "relieve" us of any problems.

t_ch: 现在听来，这话多少有些言外之意。而他身边的知更鸟小姐…我虽不懂歌唱，但也能听出她声音中的古怪——即将登台献唱的歌者，嗓音怎会透出一丝古怪？
t_en: In hindsight, there was more to that statement. He also had Miss Robin with him... I'm no singer, but her voice sounded a little strange... Would a singer really take to the stage if their voice wasn't in top shape?

t_ch: 你怀疑家族并非邀请函的发出者，并且——对我们有所隐瞒？
t_en: Are you saying... you suspect that The Family did not send the invite, and... is hiding something from us?

t_ch: 不无可能。家族向其他派系发出邀约，本就是件不同寻常的事。你的发现也印证了或许有第三者参与其中…我收回前言，这场「盛会」不简单哪。
t_en: It's possible. The fact that The Family sent out invites to the other factions is already unusual. And your discovery confirms that there could be a third party involved... I take back what I said: This "event" is becoming more interesting with each passing second.

t_ch: 为什么不告诉孩子们？
t_en: Why didn't you tell the others?

t_ch: 如果这只是匹诺康尼或家族的内部事务，我们不应随意插手。
t_en: We shouldn't interfere if this is just an internal affair of Penacony or The Family.

t_ch: 但你也说了，这事或许与「开拓」有关。
t_en: But you said so yourself: This could concern the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 我是这么说了，所以……
t_en: Well, I did, which is why...

t_ch: …所以在出发前，我就告诉小三月和丹恒啦。
t_en: ...before we set off, I told March 7th and Dan Heng about this.

t_ch: 原来只有我被蒙在鼓里啊。
t_en: So I was the only one kept in the dark then.

t_ch: 我也是刚刚才知道邀请函的事…
t_en: I too just found out about the invite thingy...

t_ch: 因为你一路上都睡得死死的，没机会和你说嘛。
t_en: That's because you were zonked out the whole ride. No one had the chance to tell you.

t_ch: 看来必须要参与了。
t_en: Time to get involved.

t_ch: 有本银河球棒侠在，都不成问题！
t_en: Ain't no biggie when Galactic Baseballer is in the house!

t_ch: 匹诺康尼形势复杂，还是谨慎点为好。
t_en: Penacony's situation is getting complicated. Let's tread lightly.

t_ch: 邀请函究竟是哪一方势力寄出的，将一众派系召集至匹诺康尼的目的是什么，家族又为何知情不言…此行疑点众多，在查清更多事实前，不可贸然出手。
t_en: Who sent the invite, what is the purpose of gathering all the factions into Penacony, and why does The Family choose to remain silent about their knowledge of this... There are too many unanswered questions. We must use the utmost caution before we go deeper.

t_ch: 眼下就先专注于列车长的请求，一边收集情报，一边享受「美好的假期」吧——匹诺康尼毕竟是闻名宇宙的度假胜地，很多人可能一辈子都来不了哦。
t_en: Right now, let's just focus on the conductor's request: We'll collect intel while enjoying this "wonderful vacation." Penacony is, after all, a famed resort of the cosmos. Not many get a chance to even visit in their lifetime.

t_ch: 真巧啊，咱们又见面了。
t_en: How fortuitous, we meet again.

t_ch: 这是我的房间，你怎么在这？
t_en: This is my room. What are you doing here?

t_ch: 这是你的房间…？
t_en: Is this your room...?

t_ch: 又见面了，朋友！
t_en: We meet again, friend!

t_ch: 没错，朋友！
t_en: That's right, pal!

t_ch: 别紧张，我就是过来沾沾喜气。它现在是你的房间了，但半个系统时前——还是我的。
t_en: Calm down, I'm just here to soak in the festive vibe. This may be your room now, but half a system hour ago, it was still mine.

t_ch: 幸运的楼号，幸运的楼层，幸运的房间号，我费了好大工夫才订到这么个宝地…送给你了，要好好珍惜啊，朋友。
t_en: A lucky block number, a lucky floor, a lucky room number. You have no idea how much I went through to book this precious space... And now I've given it to you. Treasure it well, friend.

t_ch: 这房间是你让给我的？
t_en: You were the one who transferred it to me?

t_ch: 不然呢，还能是家族白给的？
t_en: Of course. What, you thought The Family acted simply out of their own good will?

t_ch: 入住是你安排的？
t_en: You were the one who arranged the check-in?

t_ch: 不不，我只是把自己的房间让给了你。
t_en: No no, I only let you have my room.

t_ch: 不管有什么理由，出去。
t_en: Well, it doesn't matter. You need to leave.

t_ch: 哎，这话我就不爱听了……
t_en: I'm not sure I like that tone...

t_ch: 这匹诺康尼可是货真价实的梦想之地，全银河有多少人愿意花上半辈子时间，就为拿到一张白日梦酒店的入场券？
t_en: Penacony's a true-blue land of dreams. How many across the stars would spend half their lives, just to acquire an admission ticket into The Reverie?

t_ch: 好好想想，能入住这里的都是些什么人物。要不是我出谋划策，家族哪敢得罪那些名流大咖，来给你这位「不速之客」开后门？
t_en: Think about the type of people who can even afford to stay here. If it wasn't for my brilliant plan, you think The Family would offend those bigwigs, just to sate the paltry whims of an unsought guest such as yourself?

t_ch: 所以坐下来聊聊吧——于情于理，我都有这个资格，不是么？
t_en: So sit down, and let's have a chat. With everything said and done, I think I deserve at least this much, right?

t_ch: 你想聊什么？
t_en: What do you want to talk about?

t_ch: 聪明人就是爽快。
t_en: Cutting to the chase, I like that.

t_ch: 你应该找姬子，或瓦尔特。
t_en: You should go talk to Himeko or Welt.

t_ch: 错了，我要找的人就是你。
t_en: Wrong. You're the one I seek.

t_ch: 简单来说，朋友，我需要你的帮助。你或许还不知道，匹诺康尼远没有它看上去那么简单，家族的眼线遍布这里，我不想明说，你明白的。
t_en: Simply put, my friend, I need your help. You may or may not know this, but Penacony's far murkier than it seems. The Family's eyes are everywhere, but you get the drift.

t_ch: 我的目的很简单，帮公司拿回一些本属于它的东西。如果你愿意帮我，事成之后，你会得到丰厚的回报，还有「存护」的庇护。
t_en: My goal is simple: Help the IPC retrieve some things that belonged to them in the first place. If you agree, when this is done, you will stand to reap great rewards, as well as the Preservation's protection.

t_ch: 毕竟你和其他人不同。你很特别，特别到足以掀翻整张牌桌。那股*力量*，你不想使用它吗？或者…你不想摆脱它吗？你不想靠它名扬宇宙吗？
t_en: It's clear you're not just one of the crowd. You possess a distinct quality, so magnetic that it could sway the outcome of any game. That *power*, you really don't wish to use it? Or... you don't want to be rid of it? Why not use it to etch your name across the stars?

t_ch: 那众人恐惧却渴望的力量，就在你双手一握中……
t_en: The power that men both fear and desire is right in the palms of your hands...

t_ch: …「星核」{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我说对了吗？
t_en: ...{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron, have I hit the nail on the head?

t_ch: 你是怎么知道的？
t_en: How did you know?

t_ch: 我现在知道了。
t_en: I know now.

t_ch: 我听不懂你在说什么。
t_en: I don't know what you're talking about.

t_ch: 演技不错，我喜欢。
t_en: Your acting's good, I like that.

t_ch: 我警告你，离开这里。
t_en: I'm warning you, you need to leave now.

t_ch: 「警告」！哈哈哈，你太幽默了。
t_en: Warning me! Hahaha, you're too funny.

t_ch: 你不用现在答复我，思考也需要时间。等时机成熟，我自然会来找你。
t_en: You don't have to answer me now. Sit on it for a while. When the time is right, I will look for you again.

t_ch: 当然，你也可以和同伴商量，甚至反过来利用我，我很欢迎——因为这也是在向我展示你们的价值。
t_en: Of course, you can confer with your colleagues as well, or go as far as to use me in turn — I welcome that notion. Because it will also show me your true value.

t_ch: 我从不做赔本买卖的，希望各位「朋友」…别让我失望。
t_en: I don't do deals where I'm on the losing end. So, I hope that "friends"... don't let me down.

t_ch: 我会考虑的。
t_en: I will think about it.

t_ch: 嗯，很好。
t_en: Mm, very well.

t_ch: 我不能自作主张。
t_en: I cannot make this decision on my own.

t_ch: 我说了，不用急着答复，因为无论如何…结果都不会变。
t_en: I already said there's no rush to give me an answer. Because no matter what happens... the outcome will remain the same.

t_ch: 你真的该走了。
t_en: You should really be going.

t_ch: 我说了，不用急着答复，因为无论如何…结果都不会变。
t_en: I already said there's no rush to give me an answer. Because no matter what happens... the outcome will remain the same.

t_ch: 哦对了，临走前，咱们再玩个游戏吧。很简单，猜猜筹码在我哪只手里——就当是认识一下，好让你更了解我这人的性格，和做事方式……
t_en: Oh yes, before I go, let's play another game — a simple game, to get to know each other better. You just have to guess which hand the chip is hiding in. It'll help you get a better grasp on my personality, and the way I do things...

t_ch: 叮——一枚筹码被抛向空中，又眨眼间消失不见，取而代之的是两只紧握的手，横在你的面前。
t_en: Ding— A chip is tossed into the air, and in the blink of an eye, it disappears, replaced by two clenched fists held out in front of you.

t_ch: 左还是右？准备好——我要揭晓答案了。
t_en: Left or right? Get ready, I'm about to reveal the answer.

t_ch: …哦，好像还没问你选哪边呢。但没关系，因为——
t_en: ...Oh, I didn't get your answer. But that's fine, because...

t_ch: 怎么了，拉帝奥？别愁眉苦脸的了…嘿，我才注意到，你那英俊的石膏头呢？
t_en: What is it, Ratio? Why the long face... Hey, I just realized, where's that handsome bust of yours?

t_ch: 你迟到了，整整4分<unbreak>16</unbreak>秒。你最好是用这段时间解开了阿基维利陨落之谜——如果没有，那我会忠告你别去找无名客的麻烦。
t_en: You're late, by four minutes and sixteen seconds. You'd better have solved the mystery of Akivili's fall. Otherwise, I'd suggest not tangling with the Nameless.

t_ch: 找麻烦？连你也这么觉得？就没人相信我真的只是想和他们交朋友？
t_en: You mean you don't believe me when I say I truly wish to befriend them?

t_ch: 聒噪的家伙可交不到朋友。一个小知识：阿蒂尼孔雀是宇宙中叫声数一数二难听的鸟类，而你这身行头正像一只花枝招展的孔雀……
t_en: Clamorous people do not make friends. Fun fact: The Attini Peacock boasts one of the universe's more jarring songs, and your choice of attire is somewhat peacock-esque.

t_ch: …看来这只孔雀的羽毛还被人拔光了——行李被家族没收了？
t_en: ...It seems this peacock is short of a feather or two. The Family's been rummaging through your things, haven't they?

t_ch: 嗯，都被那穿灰西装的给扣了，所有的礼金，还有存放「基石」的匣子…嗯？你往哪走呢？
t_en: Yeah, by that gray-suited fellow. All the cash gifts, and the box containing the Cornerstones... Eh? Where're you going?

t_ch: 打道回府，告诉公司有个蠢货把一切都搞砸了。
t_en: Back home, to tell the corporation that some idiot ruined everything.

t_ch: 几块石头罢了，这么悲观干嘛？没了又怎样？
t_en: It's nothing more than a few rocks, why so serious? Who cares if they're gone?

t_ch: 没了那块「砂金石」，你就只是个被公司判了死刑的茨冈尼亚奴隶——还是说，你脖子上那行「商品编码」也是琥珀王的恩赐？
t_en: Without that aventurine stone, you're nothing more than a doomed Sigonian thrall sentenced to die by the IPC. Or is that serial number on your neck a cherished memento from the Amber Lord?

t_ch: …哦，可以啊，幽默！看来我们这位博学的朋友是好好备过课了。
t_en: ...Hah, you're funny, I'll give you that! It appears our erudite friend has done his homework.

t_ch: 这是我的工作，不然一个赌徒要怎么替公司收复{RUBY_B#边陲监狱}匹诺康尼{RUBY_E#}？
t_en: It's my job. How would a gambler wrest {RUBY_B#Frontier Prison}Penacony{RUBY_E#} back for the IPC otherwise?

t_ch: 放心吧，教授，我有的是办法。家族害怕公司搞事，所以才处处针锋相对…搞不好，匹诺康尼从始至终就是「同谐」的阴谋。
t_en: Don't worry, Doctor, I have my ways. The Family fears interference from the IPC, hence their constant intervention... Or, to play devil's advocate, perhaps Penacony might have always been a ruse under the guise of "the Harmony?"

t_ch: 要我说，那封邀请函就是个自导自演的幌子，或许是他们想在谐乐大典上做点什么出格的事……
t_en: If you ask me, that invite is nothing but a self-planted diversion, a red herring. Or maybe they're thinking of pulling off something big during the Charmony Festival...

t_ch: …又或者邀请者另有其人，但他们默许了，想将计就计再布个更大的。无所谓，家族也好，「钟表匠的遗产」也罢，能为我所用就行。
t_en: ...Or someone else made the invite, and they acquiesced to elevating the magnitude of the plan. Regardless — be it The Family or the Watchmaker's Legacy, as long as they're all useful to me.

t_ch: 说重点。办法是什么？
t_en: Get to the point. What's your plan?

t_ch: 现在没必要讲那么清楚——还不是亮出底牌的时候。
t_en: No need to expand on that now. It's not yet time to reveal my trump card.

t_ch: 该死的赌徒，合作的前提是互相信任——茨冈尼亚人的学前教育里不包含这个吗？
t_en: Damned gambler. Any true collaboration demands trust. Did that notion somehow escape your Sigonian upbringing?

t_ch: 那你信任我吗？
t_en: Then, do you trust me?

t_ch: 这取决于你的态度。
t_en: That depends on you.

t_ch: 所以你也不信任我，这不就行了？还有，我没读过书，我父母也确实没教过这个——很遗憾，他们还没来得及教就走了。
t_en: So you don't trust me either. Now that was easy, wasn't it? Also, I didn't go to school, and my parents didn't teach me any of that. A pity, they left before they could impart any life lessons.

t_ch: …我无意冒犯。
t_en: ...I did not mean to offend.

t_ch: 别在意。但他们教过我「朋友就是埃维金人的武器」——在「同谐」虎视眈眈的情况下，咱们的「朋友」确实越多越好。
t_en: I'm not offended. But they did teach me that friends are weapons of the Avgins. Even under the watchful eye of the Harmony, we need as many friends as we can get.

t_ch: 我想想啊，流光忆庭和星穹列车已经接触过了，泯灭帮…多半没戏，纯美骑士团还不知道是否会赴约，至于「酒馆」的家伙们……
t_en: Let's see, the Garden of Recollection and the Astral Express have already made contact. The Annihilation Gang... I can't really count on them. The Knights of Beauty haven't given their answer, and as for that bunch at the Tavern...

t_ch: …说到这个，刚才遇见个女人，说是巡海游侠。我总觉得哪里不对劲，你去帮我探探她的底细……
t_en: ...Speaking of which, I ran into a woman just now who introduced herself as a Galaxy Ranger. The whole conversation felt off. Help me look into her...

t_ch: …人呢？
t_en: ...Huh?

t_ch: …不至于这么讨厌我吧？唉，看来还是得靠自己了。
t_en: ...You don't really disdain me that much, do you? Well, seems like I'm on my own again.

t_ch: 欢迎光临白日梦酒店——愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如有搬运行李到客房的需求，随时可以找我。
t_en: Welcome to the Reverie! May you have an unforgettable holiday! Should you need assistance with moving your luggage to your room, feel free to contact me.

t_ch: 听说这座酒店非同一般。
t_en: I hear this hotel is pretty unique.

t_ch: 是的！白日梦酒店不仅为大家提供客房，还连接着匹诺康尼的现实与梦境。来自银河各地的客人在这里沉入梦境，开启美梦之旅。
t_en: Yeah, it is! The Reverie does not only provide accommodation for its guests, it is also connected to both Penacony's reality and dreamscape. Guests from all over the cosmos come here to immerse themselves in a marvelous, dreamy journey.

t_ch: 梦不是虚假的吗？
t_en: Aren't dreams fake?

t_ch: 好深奥的问题！也许不是所有的梦都是虚假的…至少匹诺康尼的梦不是。应该这样说，它…是另一种现实。
t_en: A good question! Maybe not all dreams are false... Well, at least the ones in Penacony aren't. Or perhaps should I say they are... another reality.

t_ch: 做梦不会很累吗？
t_en: Won't I get tired out from all that dreaming?

t_ch: 酒店的「入梦池」会提供舒适的梦境体验，您不用担心！
t_en: The hotel's Dreampool provides a comfortable dream experience, so don't you worry about that!

t_ch: 在这里工作的体验怎么样？
t_en: How is it working here?

t_ch: 啊…您是在问我吗？嗯…还不错，这里人来人往，能听见许多客人讲起他们的冒险见闻。
t_en: Er... Are you asking me? Hmm... It's not too bad. Many guests come and go, and I get to hear all about their adventures.

t_ch: 原来如此，我知道了。
t_en: I see, got it.

t_ch: 等入梦后，您就能体会到我说的了，匹诺康尼一定不会让您失望！
t_en: You'll know what I mean when you enter a dream. Penacony will not disappoint!

t_ch: 所以匹诺康尼究竟是…
t_en: So Penacony is...

t_ch: 嗯！现实中的匹诺康尼就是这座酒店。而梦中的匹诺康尼…是奇迹诞生的地方，奢华的享乐之地，盛大的筵席永不落幕！
t_en: Yes! This hotel is Penacony in real life. And the Penacony in the dream... is a place where miracles are born. A land of lavish joy, a grand banquet where the curtains never fall!

t_ch: 唔，很难用词语形容它的美妙。总之，您一定会为之惊叹的！
t_en: Mm... It's hard to describe its magnificence in words. In any case, you will surely be awed!

t_ch: 听说家族举办了一场盛会。
t_en: I hear The Family held a grand event.

t_ch: 您的消息真灵通！那是家族提供的一个机会，也是盛会之星的传统。
t_en: You are well-informed indeed! It is an opportunity provided by The Family, and a tradition on the Planet of Festivities.

t_ch: 大家齐聚一堂，享受着欢乐，追逐着机遇，孤注一掷赌上自己的一切，最后将梦想化作现实！
t_en: Everyone gathers in the hall, reveling in merriment, pursuing opportunities, staking all they have on one desperate gamble, and finally, their dreams become reality!

t_ch: 没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have nothing else to ask.

t_ch: 祝您在匹诺康尼度过一个愉快的假期！
t_en: May you have a pleasant stay in Penacony!

t_ch: 不好意思，可系统里确实没有您说的这个名字……
t_en: I'm sorry, but your name really isn't in the system...

t_ch: 但星穹列车收到的信息里，写明了已为我们预订了房间，麻烦您再检查一遍吧。
t_en: But in the information I received from the Astral Express, it states that we already reserved rooms. Please check again for me.

t_ch: 我再为您查询一下，请稍等……
t_en: Yes ma'am, please give me a moment...

t_ch: 星穹列车，铂金客房共四间…分别是瓦尔特•杨先生、姬子女士、三月七女士，以及……
t_en: The Astral Express, four platinum guest rooms... whose names include Mr. Welt Yang, Miss Himeko, Miss March 7th, and...

t_ch: …丹恒先生。确实只有以上四位的预订信息。
t_en: ...Mr. Dan Heng. These are the only four names on the reservation list.

t_ch: 遇到麻烦了吗？
t_en: Something wrong?

t_ch: 是啊，酒店的预订信息里似乎没有你的名字……
t_en: Yes, your name isn't on the hotel's reservation list...

t_ch: 这是怎么了？
t_en: What's going on?

t_ch: 遇到了点麻烦。酒店的预订信息里似乎没有你的名字……
t_en: We've run into some trouble. Your name isn't on the hotel's reservation list...

t_ch: 是的，我是丹恒先生。
t_en: And yes, I'm Mr. Dan Heng, reporting for duty.

t_ch: 丹恒……
t_en: Dan Heng...

t_ch: …我明白了，难怪这里没有{NICKNAME}的名字。我们答复家族的时候，{M#他}{F#她}还没有登上列车。
t_en: ...I understand. No wonder {NICKNAME}'s name here is missing. When we responded to The Family's invitation, {F#she}{M#he} hadn't even arrived on the Express.

t_ch: 您看这样可以吗？与我们同行的丹恒行程临时有变，没办法入住，能麻烦您把为他预留的房间转让给这孩子吗？人数也对得上。
t_en: Something came up in Dan Heng's schedule, and he couldn't make it. I have an idea — could you reassign his room? It's still the same number of people.

t_ch: 这孩子是我们星穹列车的新乘客，我们可以为{M#他}{F#她}的身份作担保。
t_en: {M#He's}{F#She's} a new passenger aboard our Astral Express. We can vouch for {M#his}{F#her} status.

t_ch: 这，您突然这么说，恐怕……
t_en: I— even if that is so, I'm afraid...

t_ch: （出示漫游签证…）
t_en: (Show Trailblazer profile...)

t_ch: （出示筑城者的骑枪…）
t_en: (Show Architect's lance...)

t_ch: （出示结盟玉兆…）
t_en: (Show Jade Abacus of Allying Oath...)

t_ch: 不，我不是怀疑您的身份，只是……
t_en: No, I'm not doubting your status, it's just...

t_ch: 嗨，朋友，还好吧？刚才开了个玩笑，希望你不要介意。
t_en: Hello, friend. How have you been? I sincerely hope you don't mind.

t_ch: 好冷的玩笑。
t_en: I do mind.

t_ch: 我为我的失礼道歉，拿去吧，<unbreak>10000</unbreak>信用点——一点见面礼，算是我的补偿。
t_en: My apologies for any perceived slight. To show my sincerity, I offer you <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits as a gesture of goodwill.

t_ch: 这还差不多。
t_en: That's better.

t_ch: 不打不相识，朋友！现在我们就算真正认识了。
t_en: What're friends without friction! Now we're truly acquainted.

t_ch: 你一点都不了解朋友是什么。
t_en: You have no idea what friends are.

t_ch: 有骨气，我喜欢！你这个朋友我交定了——拿着，<unbreak>20000</unbreak>信用点！
t_en: Such integrity, I like it! I must have you as a friend — here, <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> credits!

t_ch: 没事，我不介意。
t_en: It's fine, I don't mind it.

t_ch: 我为我的失礼道歉，拿去吧，<unbreak>10000</unbreak>信用点——一点见面礼，算是我的补偿。
t_en: My apologies for any perceived slight. To show my sincerity, I offer you <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits as a gesture of goodwill.

t_ch: 那我就不客气了。
t_en: Then I'll gladly accept it.

t_ch: 这就对了！朋友之间不用那么见外。有什么需要的尽管开口，我都包了。
t_en: That's the spirit! Nothing should come between friends. Tell me whatever you need, it's on my tab.

t_ch: 谢谢，礼物就免了。
t_en: Thank you, but we can spare the gifts.

t_ch: 够正直，我喜欢！你这个朋友我交定了——拿着，<unbreak>20000</unbreak>信用点！
t_en: How upright, I like you! I must have you as a friend — here, <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> credits!

t_ch: 我还有事，先走一步。相信我们很快会再见的。
t_en: Please excuse me, I have some matters to attend to, so I must depart, but I'm sure we'll meet again soon.

t_ch: 哎，还真是一波三折。既然那位星期…星期日先生打了包票，我们总算可以正常入住了吧？
t_en: *sigh* It's just one surprise after another. But since that mister... which day was he? Sunday. Since Mr. Sunday has vouched for us, I guess we can finally check in normally?

t_ch: 我已经有点累了。
t_en: I'm already a little winded.

t_ch: 我也是，现在只想赶紧进到房间，在床上狠狠打滚……
t_en: You and me both! I can't wait to get inside and just flop and roll on that comfy bed...

t_ch: 等我们办完手续就可以了。
t_en: You'll have to wait for us to finish checking in first.

t_ch: 希望别再遇到麻烦了。
t_en: I hope we don't run into any more trouble.

t_ch: 有句话怎么说的来着？「祸不单行」……
t_en: How does the saying go? "Trouble comes in pairs"...

t_ch: 也有种说法叫「否极泰来」。
t_en: There's also the saying: "From misfortune comes bliss."

t_ch: 家族的名字都这么奇怪吗？
t_en: Are all The Family names so strange?

t_ch: 那应该只是个花名…吧？
t_en: This is just a stage name... I guess?

t_ch: 我也这么想，这应该是匹诺康尼或家族的某种规矩吧。
t_en: I thought so too. It's most likely some rule of Penacony's, or The Family's.

t_ch: 好了，现在大堂也没人排队，我们去找艾丽小姐吧……
t_en: Okay, there's no queue in the lobby now. Let's go find Miss Alley...

t_ch: 星穹列车的各位贵客，入住手续已经办理完成了。先前带来的诸多不便，万分抱歉。
t_en: Esteemed guests of the Astral Express, your check-in procedure is complete. Please forgive us for any previous inconvenience caused.

t_ch: 这是各位的「梦境护照」——它是酒店客房的房卡，也集成了您在「白日梦酒店」需要的全部功能和信息，并提供智能协助。
t_en: This is your Dreamscape Pass: It serves as your hotel room key, as well as a directory of all the amenities and information you require at The Reverie. It even provides smart assistance.

t_ch: 同时，它还是一份特别的匹诺康尼纪念品，独一无二，只属于您！
t_en: At the same time, it is also Penacony's special one-of-a-kind souvenir that belongs only to you!

t_ch: 您可以活用梦境护照提供的「打卡」功能，记录您在美梦中的点点滴滴，收获各种快乐，并制作出专属于您的「梦境手账」——
t_en: You can use the Dreamscape Pass's provided clock-in feature to record every moment of your wonderful dream, save your favorite happy bits, and create a Dreamscape Scrapbook that is uniquely yours.

t_ch: 具体的使用方法，梦境护照也会为您提供完整指引。
t_en: Regarding the method of usage, the Dreamscape Pass will guide you through the process.

t_ch: 愿各位在匹诺康尼尽情享受美梦，乘坐那边的电梯就可以抵达客房了。
t_en: I wish you all pleasant dreams in Penacony. You may take the elevator over there to reach your guest rooms.

t_ch: 好耶——我们现在就出发吧！
t_en: Alright! Let's move out!

t_ch: 怎么了，还不打算入睡？是找不到房间，还是有心事想找我聊聊？
t_en: What's wrong? Not turning in? Can't find your room, or do you have something on your mind?

t_ch: 关于「钟表匠」…
t_en: About the Watchmaker...

t_ch: 谈及盛会之星，就不得不提到「钟表匠」，匹诺康尼家喻户晓的大亨。财富、名誉、地位…他靠双手打拼出了所有人向往的事业，成为梦想的象征。
t_en: One can't discuss the Planet of Festivities without mentioning the Watchmaker — Penacony's household name and figure. Fortune, fame, status... He built everyone's futures with his bare hands, and became the symbol of dreams.

t_ch: 但这些故事有多少是真…却无迹可寻。钟表匠的出身和过去众说纷纭，也有人怀疑他只是一个家族虚构的形象。
t_en: But the veracity of these stories... remains untraceable. Many have their own opinions on the Watchmaker's origin and past, and there are even some who suspect he is a conceptual construct of The Family.

t_ch: 暂时，我不认为这封邀请函真的和钟表匠有关，他的遗产…更像是一种引人耳目的说辞。
t_en: For now, I do not think this invite is linked to the Watchmaker. His legacy... It sounds more like a marketing hook to drum up more traffic, if nothing else.

t_ch: 关于那位公司代表…
t_en: About that IPC representative...

t_ch: 别有用心的公司使节，巧舌如簧的精明商人，张扬轻浮的阔绰公子…也许都是吧，直觉告诉我，他还有深藏不露的一面。
t_en: An IPC ambassador who knows more than he lets on, a silver-tongued businessman, a flamboyant and debonair aristocrat... He could be all of them. My instincts tell me he's much more than meets the eye.

t_ch: 在形势明朗前，我们最好和各方都保持良好的关系，但同时也要保持警惕。
t_en: Before the dust settles, we should maintain amicable relations with all camps, while keeping our guards up.

t_ch: 关于梦中的行程…
t_en: About the dream journey...

t_ch: 梦中的匹诺康尼被划分为十二片独立的梦境，听说初次入梦时，不同人去往的目的地也不尽相同。
t_en: The dream Penacony is divided into twelve individual dreamscapes. I've heard that the destinations vary for different people when they first enter the dream.

t_ch: 我的话…会期待「热砂的时刻」，那里的野风、酒馆和{RUBY_B#「苏乐达™盛会海选•热砂分会场」}盛会海选{RUBY_E#}更有无名客的开拓色彩。「朝露的时刻」也是个不错的选择，可以借机拜访下家族。
t_en: As for me... I look forward to the Moment of Scorchsand — its wild winds, taverns, and {RUBY_B#SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions • Scorchsand Venue}festive choices{RUBY_E#} have more of a Nameless Trailblaze vibe. The Moment of Morning Dew is also a decent choice — I can use that chance to visit The Family.

t_ch: 先聊到这吧。
t_en: That's enough chit-chat for now.

t_ch: 因为种种意外耽误了这么久，想必你也累坏了吧——开拓之余，也别忘了好好放松哦。晚安，做个好梦。
t_en: You must be exhausted from everything that's happened so far. Even if you're Trailblazing, you mustn't forget to relax. Goodnight, and sweet dreams.

t_ch: 这里的装潢实在是有些…吵闹。这就是银河上流人士的生活么……
t_en: The decor in here's a little... loud for my tastes. So this is how astral high society does things, huh...?

t_ch: 关于「钟表匠」…
t_en: About the Watchmaker...

t_ch: 据说是匹诺康尼的历史名人，他的传奇经历口口相传，激励人们来到盛会之星追逐梦想。真是个有趣的人，想来其遗产也极具吸引力吧。
t_en: They say he's a historically important figure in Penacony, and tales of his life have been handed down over generations. Such tales encourage believers to come to the Planet of Festivities to pursue their dreams. He's an interesting fellow, that's for sure, and his legacy still has the power to draw people in.

t_ch: 不过，他为何会与邀请函扯上关系，又为何会出现在疑似无名客发出的密文里…我暂时也没有头绪。
t_en: But how and why he's involved with that invite, and why his name popped up in the encrypted message allegedly sent by a Nameless... I've got no leads for now.

t_ch: 关于「家族」…
t_en: About The Family...

t_ch: 家族信仰「同谐」，他们救苦援弱的善迹在星间闻名遐迩，匹诺康尼的稳定与繁荣与之息息相关。
t_en: The Family believes in the Harmony, and their altruism is well-known across the stars — a trait that is intimately tied to Penacony's stability and prosperity.

t_ch: 但也有些势力始终对家族保持关注，认为他们温和的言语中另有它意…但考虑到家族对访客一贯的友好态度，我们暂时不用过分担心。
t_en: But some factions have always been wary of The Family — suspecting that their benevolence and eloquence belie an ulterior motive... So far, it seems to me that The Family treats their guests with courtesy, so I don't think we need to worry about that for now.

t_ch: 关于梦中的行程…
t_en: About the dream journey...

t_ch: 梦中的匹诺康尼被分成十二个时刻，我个人对「太阳的时刻」很感兴趣，那是一座承载了匹诺康尼历史、文化的观赏梦境。
t_en: The dream Penacony is divided into twelve moments. Personally, I'm interested in the Moment of Sol — it's a visual dreamscape steeped in Penacony's history and civilization.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼大博物馆、初醒图书馆、折纸大学…这些地方都有可能存放着我们想要探寻的过去。
t_en: Penacony's Grand Museum, the Primal Waking Library, the Paperfold academy... The pasts that we chase may be stored in these places.

t_ch: 先聊到这吧。
t_en: That's enough chit-chat for now.

t_ch: 通过客房的入梦池就可以去往「真正的匹诺康尼」，准备好了就出发吧。祝你在梦中玩得愉快。
t_en: Past the guest room's Dreampool is the real Penacony. Let's get ready to move out. Pleasant dreams.

t_ch: 哇，你是不是也激动得睡不着觉！我已经迫不及待想见识梦中的世界了！
t_en: Can't sleep from all the excitement, huh? I can't wait to experience the dream world!

t_ch: 打算先去哪？
t_en: Where are you thinking of going?

t_ch: 那肯定是「薄暮的时刻」啦！来度假胜地怎么可以不去购物天堂！我已经准备好装满购物袋了！
t_en: The Moment of Dusk, obviously! How can you not visit the shopping paradise when you're at the resort of all resorts! I'm all ready to fill my bags to the brim!

t_ch: 嗯…买完东西之后，就换上美美的晚礼服，去匹诺康尼大剧院欣赏知更鸟小姐的演唱吧！
t_en: Hmm... After doing my shopping, I'll get all dolled up in an evening gown to attend Miss Robin's show at Penacony Grand Theater!

t_ch: 关于知更鸟…
t_en: About Robin...

t_ch: 说来有些在意，杨叔似乎也发现了，知更鸟小姐的声音听着有些疲惫…我不知道怎么形容，就是和平时不太一样？
t_en: You know, it's weird. Welt noticed it too, about how Miss Robin's voice sounded somewhat weary... I can't quite put my finger on it, but it was different than usual?

t_ch: 是不是之前的银河巡回演唱会累到了？这种情况还坚持演出，知更鸟小姐真是艺人的楷模啊！
t_en: Could she be tired out from her Cosmic Concert Tour? Insisting on performing under such circumstances, Miss Robin is a superstar among celebrities!

t_ch: 关于盛会…
t_en: About the event...

t_ch: 开始我还以为这次真是来度假的，但现在…我觉得这场「盛会」一定非同一般！各方势力解读谜语，争夺遗产，简直和侦探小说一模一样！
t_en: Here I was, thinking of some good ol' relaxation, but nope! This "event" is a wild ride! The various factions deciphering the riddle, a power struggle of past legacies — feels like we're in a live-action detective saga!

t_ch: 说不定还会有亲人反目、家破人亡、阴阳两隔、血流成河之类的经典桥段，那可太刺激了……
t_en: Who knows, maybe we'll even witness classic scenarios like family feuds, tragic losses, worlds torn apart, espionage situations, rivers running red with blood, stuff like that! This is simply too thrilling...

t_ch: 成语储备还挺多。
t_en: You've got quite the active imagination.

t_ch: 别太吓人。
t_en: That sounds scary.

t_ch: 我要看血流成河！
t_en: I too wanna see a river of blood!

t_ch: 开玩笑的，怎么可能嘛。
t_en: Just kidding, how could that be possible?

t_ch: 先聊到这吧。
t_en: That's enough chit-chat for now.

t_ch: 放心，反正天塌下来，也有杨叔和姬子姐姐顶着呢，要好好享受难得的假期哦！
t_en: Don't worry, Welt and Himeko will have our backs if things go wrong. Let's just make the most of it all while we're here.

t_ch: …你的房间？
t_en: ...Your room?

t_ch: …厉害啊朋友，才来匹诺康尼没多久，就学会邀人入伙了。
t_en: ...Well played, friend. You haven't been in Penacony long, but you already know how to rope people in to your cause.

t_ch: 别误会，刚刚只是想提醒你——这地方鱼龙混杂，不怀好意的家伙可太多了，记得多长个心眼，比如…记得关门。
t_en: Don't misunderstand, that was a mere reminder. This place runs deep, with plenty of unsavory characters. Don't forget to stay on your toes. Like... keeping your door closed.

t_ch: 那我先走一步，{NICKNAME}！祝你们过得愉快。
t_en: I'll make my exit now, {NICKNAME}! Have a pleasant stay.

t_ch: 谢谢你。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 你是…？
t_en: You are...?
